com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXSeparationResult


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXSeparationResult
    Custom Constraint Return Object - hold a return value for a constraint on an object type that is also specified.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType
      Type of object to be given this constraint

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      double getMinDistance()
      Get distance as currently specified
      IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType getObject()
      Get separation type currently set
      void setMinDistance(double minDistance)
      Set the min distance to a splice where the constraint applies
      void setObject(IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType objectType)
      Set the object type for which the constraint should be applied.

    • Method Detail

      • setObject

        void setObject(IXSeparationResult.IXSeparationType objectType)
        Set the object type for which the constraint should be applied. Default is IXSeparationType.TAKEOUT
        Parameters:
        objectType - - specific

      • setMinDistance

        void setMinDistance(double minDistance)
        Set the min distance to a splice where the constraint applies
        Parameters:
        minDistance -
